alerts.title: AI chip startup Rebellions raises $400 million at $2.3B valuation in pre-IPO round
alerts.description: The startup, which is planning to go public later this year, designs chips specifically for AI inference, another challenger to Nvidia's dominance.

alerts.title: Starcloud raises $170 million Series A to build data centers in space
alerts.description: Starcloud becomes the fastest Y Combinator startup to reach unicorn status, just 17 months after demo day.

alerts.title: ScaleOps raises $130M to improve computing efficiency amid AI demand
alerts.description: ScaleOps just raised $130M to tackle GPU shortages and soaring AI cloud costs by automating infrastructure in real time.

alerts.title: Mistral AI raises $830M in debt to set up a data center near Paris
alerts.description: Mistral aims to start operating the data center by the second quarter of 2026.

alerts.title: Qodo raises $70M for code verification as AI coding scales
alerts.description: As AI floods software development with code, Qodo is betting the real challenge is making sure it actually works.

alerts.title: AI Legal Platform Startup Reaches $11B Valuation
alerts.description: The rapid growth of legal AI was underscored by a decline in legal data provider stocks after Anthropic's recent release of a legal plugin for its Cowork agent system.

alerts.title: Tencent to Double AI Spending to More Than $5B Over Next Year
alerts.description: The vendor is getting into the fast-growing AI personal agent market.

alerts.title: Samsung-backed AI chip firm Rebellions raises $400 million ahead of IPO
alerts.description: Rebellions' chips are focused on AI inferencing, putting it in competition with Nvidia as well as other startups from Groq to Cerebras.

alerts.title: Intercom's new post-trained Fin Apex 1.0 beats GPT-5.4 and Claude Sonnet 4.6 at customer service resolutions
alerts.description:
Intercom is taking an unusual gamble for a legacy software company: building its own AI model.
